mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, `language`, code_content, review_result, quality_score, bug_count, suggestion_count, `status`, ai_response_time, is_helpful, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM code_review WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO code_review (user_id, title, `language`, code_content, review_result, `status`, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{language}, #{codeContent}, #{reviewResult}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE code_review SET review_result = #{reviewResult}, quality_score = #{qualityScore}, bug_count = #{bugCount}, suggestion_count = #{suggestionCount}, `status` = #{status}, ai_response_time = #{aiResponseTime} WHERE id = #{id}
